# duplicate_pages.txt — generated by find_duplicate_pages.py on 2026-06-17
# Image files that are duplicate scans of a book page already captured
# by another image file.  These pages are excluded from the pipeline
# and from the cleaned CSV.
#
# Detection used two independent signals: book_page number AND ID range.
# 'both signals' = high confidence.  'one signal' = review recommended.
# To add pages manually: one filename per line; # lines are comments.
#
  image00210.jpg  # duplicate of image00208.jpg  [both signals: book_page=190 + IDs 12657–12736]
  image00211.jpg  # duplicate of image00209.jpg  [both signals: book_page=191 + IDs 12737–12819]
